news.summary: Singapore-based company Alchemy Pay, a prominent fiat-crypto payment gateway, revealed on May 30, 2025, a significant partnership with World Liberty Financial Inc. (WLFI), a decentralized finance platform. The collaboration aims to enable effortless access to USD1, WLFI's stablecoin linked to the US Dollar. This integration showcases Alchemy Pay's commitment to enhancing the accessibility and usability of cryptocurrency, particularly within the decentralized finance sector.
news.headline: Alchemy Pay integrates with World Liberty Financial to offer access to USD1 stablecoin, expanding options for users.

news.summary: In New York, Tamboran Resources Corporation (NYSE: TBN, ASX: TBN) has concluded their Private Placement Transaction First Tranche, issuing a total of 2,180,515 Common Stock within the company's placement capacity under Listing Rule 7.1. Details of the new shares issuance have been submitted in an Appendix 2A on the ASX. The following Second Tranche of the Placement is contingent on shareholder approval, which will be requested at a Special Shareholder Meeting of the Company scheduled to be held.
news.headline: Tamboran successfully closes First Tranche of Private Placement with 2,180,515 shares issued, Second Tranche awaits shareholder approval.

news.summary: After approximately three years since abandoning its headquarters model, Coinbase has secured a significant office space in San Francisco.
news.headline: Coinbase secures a new office in San Francisco as headquarters model is scrapped after three years.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, Telefonaktiebolaget LM Ericsson (NASDAQ: ERIC) has a total of 3,371,351,735 shares, with 261,755,983 A shares and 3,109,595,752 B shares. The combined number of votes is 572,715,558.2. The A shares hold a significant portion of these votes, contributing to the company's overall voting power. This information was disclosed by the company based in Stockholm, pointing to the distribution of ownership and voting rights within the organization.
news.headline: Telefonaktiebolaget LM Ericsson has 3.37B shares (261.76M A shares, 3.11B B shares) with 572.7M votes as of May 30, 2025.

news.summary: Starbucks Corp (NASDAQ: SBUX) is making changes to its loyalty program in an effort to improve profit margins and reposition itself as a premium brand. Starting June 24, the company will no longer offer a 25-star bonus for customers using personal reusable cups. Instead, customers will now receive double stars on entire orders. The previous system, introduced in 2022, allowed customers to earn points towards free items at the 100-point redemption level or premium offerings requiring 200-400 stars. With the new structure, customers ordering single beverages will receive fewer stars. This move is part of CEO Brian Niccol's strategy to enhance the company's profitability.
news.headline: Starbucks is cutting its 25-star bonus for reusable cups, shifting to double stars on entire orders to boost profits.

news.summary: On May 27, 2025, the ASEAN-China-GCC Economic Forum began in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, to enhance collaboration in economy, trade, and investment. This event aims to foster development opportunities and shared prosperity among participants.
news.headline: SERES was invited to the ASEAN-China-GCC Economic Forum on May 27 in Kuala Lumpur to enhance economic cooperation.

news.summary: On May 29, Bitcoin ETFs in the US saw a significant shift in investor activity as they experienced a net outflow of $347 million, breaking a 10-trading-day streak of inflows. Interestingly, the fund managed by BlackRock was the sole product to record a net inflow during this period.
news.headline: Bitcoin ETFs saw their first combined outflow in 2 weeks, as US ETFs experienced a $347M net outflow on May 29, except for BlackRock which had a net inflow.

news.summary: In the first quarter of 2025, the VILVI Group reported preliminary unaudited data showing a consolidated sales revenue of EUR 71.1 million. This reflects a significant increase of 26.5% compared to the same period in 2024, where the consolidated revenue was EUR 56.2 million.
news.headline: VILVI Group's Q1 2025 sales revenue was EUR 71.1 million, a 26.5% increase from Q1 2024's EUR 56.2 million.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, in Tokyo, Highreso Co., Ltd. revealed discounted rates for its NVIDIA H200-equipped GPUSOROBAN-AI SPACON Cloud. The GPUSOROBAN is a cost-effective cloud service tailored for GPU computing, featuring a straightforward pricing structure. Leveraging the high-performance GPU server significantly enhances computational tasks.
news.headline: Highreso offers discounts for NVIDIA H200-equipped GPUSOROBAN-AI SPACON Cloud, accepts reservations for NVIDIA B200.

news.summary: The latest report reveals that the city experienced a significant increase in COVID-19 cases, with a total of 500 new infections confirmed in the past 24 hours. Additionally, it was reported that the number of hospitalizations rose to 50, with 10 patients in critical condition. The spike in cases has prompted local officials to implement stricter safety measures, including mandatory mask-wearing and limited capacity in public spaces. The city's total active cases now stand at 1,200, marking a sharp increase from previous weeks. Authorities are urging residents to adhere to the guidelines to curb the spread of the virus.
news.headline: Company buys back 5,000 of its own shares in a transaction.

news.summary: In the latest report, it was stated that the unemployment rate in the country has reached 6.2%, with a total of 9.3 million individuals currently unemployed. This marks a slight increase from the previous quarter. Additionally, the report highlighted a growth of 2.5% in the GDP for the last fiscal year. Furthermore, inflation has risen by 1.8% in the same period. Experts suggest that these economic indicators reflect a mixed outlook for the country's economy in the coming months.
news.headline: Vision giant EssilorLuxottica's acquisition of Optegra clinics entrenches its med-tech strategy further.

news.headline: ZETADISPLAY AB (publ) released Q1 interim report for Jan-Mar 2025. Details at ir.zetadisplay.com.

news.summary: Paris Saint-Germain, a prominent sports club, has made history by becoming the first to incorporate Bitcoin into its financial portfolio as part of a strategic move towards aligning more closely with the cryptocurrency sector. This groundbreaking decision underscores the club's forward-thinking approach and aims to solidify its position as a pioneer in the sports industry.
news.headline: Paris Saint-Germain, first major sports club to hold Bitcoin, makes industry commitment ahead of Champions League Final.

news.summary: In London on May 30, 2025, Tetragon announced its Monthly Factsheet for April 2025. Their Net Asset Value stands at $3,197 million with a Fully Diluted NAV per Share of $35.39. The Share Price for TFG NA is recorded at $14.10. As for performance, the Monthly NAV per Share Total Return is at 0.3% and the Monthly Return on Equity at 0.5%. The company also released its most recent Quarterly results.
news.headline: Tetragon Financial Group Limited April 2025 Factsheet: NAV $3,197m, NAV per Share $35.39, Share Price $14.10, Monthly Return 0.3%ROE 0.5%

news.summary: In Chino Hills, California, Moonkie has launched an ideal gift for toddlers, just in time for Eid al-Adha celebrations - the Hug & Go Toddler Backpack. This product is designed to cater to the needs of modern parents who prioritize functionality alongside emotional growth. The backpack is not just a practical item but also serves as a comforting companion for young children. It is a perfect present for the festive season, combining everyday usability with emotional support. The Moonkie Hug & Go™ backpack is crafted to address developmental needs and is tailored for growing toddlers.
news.headline: Moonkie launches Hug & Go Toddler Backpack for Eid gifting. Designed for toddlers, it combines functionality with emotional development. Ideal for the festive season.

news.summary: The President of the Central African Republic announced on Thursday that they plan to tokenize more than 1,700 hectares of land. This initiative will involve using the country's national meme coin, $CAR, for the transaction.
news.headline: CAR to tokenize 1,700+ hectares of land with national meme coin $CAR, President Touadéra announced.

news.summary: The Mayor of Panama City, Mayer Mizrachi, has proposed allowing ships seeking to transit the Panama Canal to bypass the queue if they make payment in Bitcoin. This suggestion could potentially streamline the process for vessels, reducing wait times and increasing efficiency. The Panama Canal is a crucial waterway, with around 14,000 ships passing through it annually. Embracing cryptocurrency payments could revolutionize the system, offering a modern alternative for transactions.
news.headline: Mayor of Panama City proposes allowing Bitcoin payments for faster access for ships in the Panama Canal.

news.summary: Matt Cole, CEO of Strive Asset Management, recently urged tech giant Meta Platforms Inc. to invest in Bitcoin for its balance sheet. During the Bitcoin 2025 conference in Las Vegas, Cole made a public call to Meta, emphasizing the advantages of incorporating Bitcoin into corporate reserves. He highlighted the diminishing value of cash and short-term reserves in the current economic landscape, pointing out the ongoing global fiat debt crisis. The CEO's suggestion for Meta to buy Bitcoin comes amidst a push for corporations to diversify their balance sheets with crypto assets. The news was shared on social media by Bitcoin Magazine, sparking interest in the potential move. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: CEO calls on Meta Platforms Inc. to buy Bitcoin for its balance sheet, citing benefits at Bitcoin 2025 conference.
CEO Confidence Index for US Economy Shows Record Drop in Q2 2025 — Conference Board

news.summary: Hester Peirce, a Commissioner at the SEC, has expressed support for the provided guidance, mentioning its ability to offer clarity to stakers. In contrast, fellow Commissioner Caroline Crenshaw has criticized the same guidance for allegedly disregarding current laws.
news.headline: SEC staff state crypto staking on PoS blockchains is not a security. Commissioner Peirce supported the guidance for clarity, but Crenshaw disagrees.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, Azazie, a prominent direct-to-consumer (DTC) e-commerce platform specializing in bridal and occasion wear, has expanded its presence to physical stores, garnering significant interest from UK brides. The California-headquartered company is gaining traction among customers as it continues to grow its offline reach. This move marks a strategic shift for Azazie, known for its online retailing success, to tap into a new market segment and expand its global footprint. With a strong focus on offering high-quality and affordable products, Azazie aims to cater to the increasing demand for bridal and occasionwear. This shift in strategy demonstrates the brand's commitment to adapting to changing consumer preferences and reaching a wider audience.
news.headline: Azazie, DTC e-tailer for bridal wear, disrupts UK wedding scene with pop-ups, gaining attention of UK brides.
